chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1105 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-7493/2020 (if granted) 2. For hearing of main case 12.01.2021 M/s Muhammad Ramzan and Nisar Ahmed Narejo Advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. A.G Sindh. === 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed that respondents 2 to 4 be directed to issue appointment order in his favour for the post of Police Constable in the Police Department. Comments have been filed today by respondent No.3 / DIGP Hyderabad Range wherein it is stated that the petitioner was declared unfit as the measurement of his chest and his height were less than the requisite standard, and same was the position even after re-measurement of his chest and height, which was made at his request. It is also stated by respondent No.3 in his comments that the petitioner has also filed C.P. No.D-3371/2017 wherein same relief has been sought by him, and the said petition is still pending before this Court. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he is not aware of any earlier petition filed by the petitioner nor has the petitioner disclosed such fact to him. Be that as it may, he does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
